app.name: CRAN Web Technologies Task View
app.one_liner: A curated list of R packages for web-related technologies, maintained as a CRAN Task View.

screens.name: Task View Overview
screens.purpose: Display the current list of curated R packages for web technologies with descriptions and categories.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist a new package suggestion or update to the task view metadata.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add validation to flag packages archived on CRAN >60 days
week 1: Implement basic contribution workflow via GitHub issues
week 1: Parse existing WebTechnologies.md into structured package list
acceptance_tests: Contributors can submit suggestions through documented channels per contribution guidelines.
System flags any package listed in task view that has been archived on CRAN for more than 60 days.
